Title: Emotional Intelligence Snapshot
Description: A brief self-reflection on the five core components of emotional intelligence to identify your strongest and most underdeveloped areas.
SchemaJson: {"id":"eq_snapshot_v1","title":"Emotional Intelligence Snapshot","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"rating","label":"How well do you understand your own emotional triggers and patterns?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"rating","label":"How effectively do you manage your emotions when under pressure or receiving criticism?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"rating","label":"How well do you read the emotions and non-verbal cues of colleagues?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"choice","label":"Which EQ area do you most want to develop?","options":["Self-awareness","Self-regulation","Motivation and resilience","Empathy","Social and relationship skills"],"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"Describe a recent situation where your emotions influenced a professional decision or interaction.","required":false}]}
